item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 26s THE BIG READ
'Perception doesn't bother me - I don't care what people think. If you don't like it, you don't like it - I've not done anything wrong'
Read more with RacingPost+ De racingpost.com 3

item.title: paddypower: Paddy Power @paddypower · 3min GOAL! Calvert Lewin finishes Wolves off. Leeds are going nine points clear of Spurs. 3-0

item.title:
RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 30min Clifford Lee on ALPARSLAN
'He's a lovely horse, who made sure the rest of the field da
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 30min Clifford Lee on ALPARSLAN
'He's a lovely horse, who made sure the rest of the field danced to his tune. He ran a fantastic race when winning in Ireland last year and he's just a pleasure to ride.
He'll come on for that run fitness-wise but he did it well. He stays well but Mostrar más Cita Racing Post @RacingPost · 1h 'He could be a 2,000 Guineas horse'
Alparslan downs Zavateri and Albert Einstein to land Greenham Stakes
https:// racingpost.com/news/reports/a lparslan-downs-zavateri-and-albert-einstein-to-land-greenham-stakes-al3TQ5V4CkvR/ … 1 1 2 3 mil
